title: 10 best herbal essential oils for oily hair
description: Pot marigold essential oils helps with oily hair because it contains calozone, a compound that has natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. When applied to the scalp, it helps to balance the production of sebum, reducing excess oil and purifying the pores. This results in a cleaner, healthier-looking mane with less greasiness and more manageability.
